title: Trackpad and Keyboard Settings
drDigitalIntro: Adjust how your trackpad and keyboard work. Slow down or speed up your trackpad sensitivity. Change how fast your keyboard repeats letters when you hold down a key. Enable three-finger drag if you like. Set up keyboard shortcuts for tasks you do often. Finding the right settings makes using your computer more comfortable and productive.

playgroundTask.instructions: You want to tap instead of click the trackpad. Open Trackpad settings and turn on Tap to Click.

drDigitalSuccess: Tap to Click lets you tap the trackpad lightly instead of pressing down — many people find it easier.
drDigitalHint: Open Trackpad in Settings and find the Tap to Click toggle.
